stemHtml: Considering low and high speed airflow regimes, what is the effect of flow speed on the use of Bernoulli's Principle?

options.a: Bernoulli's principle can be used at all speeds, but compressibility is promoted at speeds above Mach 0.3 - 0.4.
options.b: The effects of high speed are visible, as compressibility starts to be promoted.
options.c: Bernoulli's principle can be used between Mach 0.4 up to Mach 0.8.
options.d: Bernoulli's principle applies at subsonic speeds, but not supersonic speeds.
